mapper.insert: insert into crop(name, category, intro, description,image_url) values (#{name}, #{category}, #{intro}, #{description}, #{imageUrl})
mapper.update:
update crop
name = #{name}, category = #{category},
intro = #{intro},
description = #{description},
image_url = #{imageUrl},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select id, name, category, intro, image_url, gmt_create from crop
and name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and category like concat('%',#{category},'%')
order by gmt_modified desc
